_note: Canned deterministic A/B DIVERGENCE tape — RESIDUAL-BAND SIDE PULL. Three warmup ticks fold a stable basis (fv-mid gap = 0.05) into the guarded arm; the fourth tick's FV JUMPS to 0.60 so the guarded residual (0.10 - 0.05 = 0.05) lands INSIDE the (residual_band, extreme] band and the E4-T4 side pull fires: arm B pulls the adverse ASK and rests only the BID (QUOTE_ONE_SIDED/residual_pull_ask). Arm A is FV-blind and quotes BOTH sides (QUOTE_TWO_SIDED). The warmup prefix is byte-identical across arms; the streams diverge at tick 4 ONLY. Requires overrides ref_min_samples=2, basis_min_samples=2 (residual_band=0.03, extreme_multiple=3.0 -> extreme wall 0.09).
